commands.cmd: focused Prettier and ESLint on T020 files
focused Nutrition access/profile unit and profile-service integration tests

commands.summary: No errors; one concurrent Pantry availability warning

summary: Added additive migration 0018 and server-only private Nutrition persistence: salted scrypt principals, access-version credential rotation, sensitive profiles linked to household profiles only for attribution, deny-by-default authorization, optimistic profile updates, append-only permission grants/revocations and goal versions, immutable measurements, stable reference string IDs, and four integration tests. Full tests, lint, types, fresh migrations and diff checks pass; no route/UI/provider call or plaintext secret storage was added.
deviations: The exact GoalBuddy Worker exceeded the single-wait limit without writing files, so the PM executed the same seven-file package as permitted fallback.
Production build remains deferred because live user-owned Next dev processes own .next.
remaining_blockers: Production build after live .next ownership ends.
